# عبدالمؤمن الشطوري - Abdelmomen Elshatory

> مطور واجهات أمامية متخصص في MEVN Stack بخبرة أكثر من 3 سنوات في Vue.js و Nuxt.js

## About
Abdelmomen Elshatory (عبدالمؤمن الشطوري) is a frontend developer specializing in the MEVN Stack (MongoDB, Express.js, Vue.js, Node.js) with 3+ years of experience building modern, high-performance web applications. Available for freelance projects.

## Skills
- Vue.js, Nuxt.js (primary expertise)
- Tailwind CSS, Nuxt UI
- MongoDB, Express.js, Node.js
- Cloudinary, REST APIs
- RTL/Arabic UI development

## Key Pages
- Home: https://beingmomen.com/
- Projects: https://beingmomen.com/projects
- Blog: https://beingmomen.com/blog

- Contact: https://beingmomen.com/contact
- SDLC Guide (Arabic): https://beingmomen.com/sdlc-ar
- SDLC Guide (English): https://beingmomen.com/sdlc

## Projects
- Tiger Academy Dashboard (Nuxt 3, MongoDB, Prisma)
- Golden Tiger Academy (Nuxt 3, Nuxt UI)
- STREAMMAXY (JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap)
- Dream TV Player (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
- Spider TV (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)

## Blog
The blog covers web development topics, JavaScript, Vue.js, Nuxt.js, and software engineering best practices. Blog posts are available at https://beingmomen.com/blog
